name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, flag, turn, processes

(* State of each process: idle, trying, critical *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no flags, turn arbitrary *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
        /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = "idle" /\ flag[i] = FALSE

(* Transition relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N:
    \/ (* Trying to enter critical section *)
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ flag[i] = FALSE
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = turn
    \/ (* Entering critical section *)
       /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ flag[i] = TRUE
       /\ turn = i
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
       /\ flag' = flag
       /\ turn' = turn
    \/ (* Exiting critical section *)
       /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ flag[i] = TRUE
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
       /\ turn' = turn
    \/ (* Other processes' state unchanged *)
       /\ state' = state
       /\ flag' = flag
       /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in 1..N: i # j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, decision, participants, state


vars == <<participants, coordinator>>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "Idle"]
        /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Idle", decision |-> "None"]

Prepare == /\ coordinator.state = "Idle"
           /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
           /\ coordinator.state' = "Prepare"
           /\ coordinator.decision' = "None"
           /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

VoteYes == /\ coordinator.state = "Prepare"
           /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
           /\ coordinator.state' = "VoteYes"
           /\ coordinator.decision' = "None"
           /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteYes"]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

VoteNo == /\ coordinator.state = "Prepare"
          /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "VoteNo"
          /\ coordinator.decision' = "None"
          /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "VoteNo"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

Commit == /\ coordinator.state = "VoteYes"
          /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
          /\ coordinator.state' = "Commit"
          /\ coordinator.decision' = "Commit"
          /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

Abort == /\ coordinator.state = "VoteNo"
         /\ coordinator.decision = "None"
         /\ coordinator.state' = "Abort"
         /\ coordinator.decision' = "Abort"
         /\ participants' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
         /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State variables
VARIABLES forks, states

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]  \* fork i is owned by philosopher forks[i]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, forks are free
Init == 
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]  \* each fork i is free (owned by philosopher i)
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

\* Helper predicates
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* A philosopher can eat if both adjacent forks are free
CanEat(i) == forks[i] = i /\ forks[Right(i)] = Right(i)

\* Action: philosopher i picks up both adjacent forks to eat
PickUp(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ CanEat(i)
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

\* Action: philosopher i puts down both adjacent forks
PutDown(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = Right(i)]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

\* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(i) == 
    /\ states[i] = "thinking"
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    /\ forks' = forks

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can pick up forks, put them down, or become hungry
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        \/ PickUp(i)
        \/ PutDown(i)
        \/ BecomeHungry(i)

\* Fairness: each philosopher eventually gets to eat
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>> /\ WF_<<forks, states>>(Next)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
              /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
              /\ num' = num
              /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized to zeros
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                  /\ q[tail] = 0
                  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                  /\ size' = size + 1
                  /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                  /\ size' = size - 1
                  /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..K: q[i] \in {0,1}

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next == 
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = state
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : 
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE 
        /\ readers' = Subst(readers, r, FALSE)
  \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE 
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[r] = FALSE 
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE 
  \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE 
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE 
  /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ Len(readers) = N 
  /\ \A r \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[r] \in BOOLEAN
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Channels
CONSTANT Channels \subseteq {1..N} \X {1..N} \ {i, i \in 1..N}  \* Directed edges (channels)
CONSTANT InitState
CONSTANT InitChannelState

VARIABLES state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived

vars == <<state, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

Init == /\ state = InitState
        /\ channelState = InitChannelState
        /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

SendMarker(i) == /\ markerSent[i] = FALSE
                /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channelState, markerReceived>>

ReceiveMarker(i) == /\ markerReceived[i] = FALSE
                   /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channelState, markerSent>>

RecordState(i) == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = RecordLocalState(state[i])]
                 /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT !i..j = RecordChannelState(channelStatei..j) : j \in 1..N]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent, markerReceived>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ SendMarker(i)
          \/ ReceiveMarker(i)
          \/ RecordState(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
          /\ channelState \in [Channels -> ChanState]
          /\ markerSent \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ markerReceived \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLE token

vars == <<token>>

Init == token = 1

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store, client, op, key, value, result

vars == <<store, client, op, key, value, result>>

Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]
        /\ client = 0
        /\ op = 0
        /\ key = 0
        /\ value = 0
        /\ result = 0

Next == /\ client' = client + 1
        /\ op' = 0
        /\ key' = 0
        /\ value' = 0
        /\ result' = 0
        /\ \/ /\ op = 0
              /\ key \in Keys
              /\ op' = 1
              /\ key' = key
        /\ \/ /\ op = 1
              /\ key \in Keys
              /\ value \in Values
              /\ op' = 2
              /\ key' = key
              /\ value' = value
        /\ \/ /\ op = 2
              /\ key \in Keys
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![key] = value]
        /\ \/ /\ op = 0
              /\ key \in Keys
              /\ op' = 3
              /\ key' = key
        /\ \/ /\ op = 3
              /\ key \in Keys
              /\ result' = store[key]
              /\ op' = 4
        /\ \/ /\ op = 4
              /\ op' = 0
              /\ key' = 0
              /\ value' = 0
              /\ result' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]
          /\ client \in Nat
          /\ op \in 0..4
          /\ key \in Keys
          /\ value \in Values
          /\ result \in Values \cup {NULL}

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised |-> = 0, accepted |-> = 0, value := NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> = 0, value |-> = NULL]]
  /\ chosen = NULL

Prepare(p, v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.promised = p]

  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> proposers[j]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen
  /\ p > proposers[v].ballot
     /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![v].ballot = p]
  /\ p <= proposers[v].ballot
     /\ proposers' = proposers

Accept(p, v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> 

          [acceptors[i] EXCEPT !.accepted = p, !.value = v]

  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> proposers[j]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen
  /\ p > proposers[v].ballot
     /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![v].ballot = p]
  /\ p <= proposers[v].ballot
     /\ proposers' = proposers

Chosen(v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = v

Next == 
  \/ \E v \in 1..M : \E p \in 1..N : Prepare(p, v)
  \/ \E v \in 1..M : \E p \in 1..N : Accept(p, v)
  \/ \E v \in 1..M : Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [promised : Int, accepted : Int, value : V]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot : Int, value : V]]
  /\ chosen \in {V, NULL}

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, hasn, retransmitCount, sentChunks


\* Helper to compute the number of chunks needed
NumChunks == Ceil(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)

\* Initialize the chunks sequence (content is irrelevant for this model)
InitChunks == chunks = [i \in 1..NumChunks |-> i]

\* Action: send a chunk (non-deterministically decide if it is lost)
SendChunk(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..NumChunks
    /\ i \notin sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ackedChunks, chunks>>

\* Action: acknowledge a chunk (non-deterministically decide if it is received)
AckChunk(i) == 
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, chunks>>

\* Action: retransmit a chunk if it hasn't exceeded MAX_RETRIES
RetransmitChunk(i) == 
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, chunks>>

\* Action: give up on a chunk after exceeding MAX_RETRIES
GiveUpChunk(i) == 
    /\ i \in sentChunks
    /\ i \notin ackedChunks
    /\ retransmitCount[i] >= MAX_RETRIES
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, chunks>>

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
    \/ \E i \in 1..NumChunks: SendChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..NumChunks: AckChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..NumChunks: RetransmitChunk(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..NumChunks: GiveUpChunk(i)

\* Initial state
Init == InitChunks /\ sentChunks = {} /\ ackedChunks = {} /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..NumChunks |-> 0]

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sentChunks, ackedChunks, retransmitCount, chunks>>

\* Invariant: all chunks are either acknowledged or given up
TypeOK == \A i \in 1..NumChunks: i \in ackedChunks \/ i \in sentChunks /\ retransmitCount[i] >= MAX_RETRIES

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Keys

VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId

(* db: mapping from key to value *)
(* txns: mapping from transaction id to transaction state *)
(* nextTxId: next transaction id to assign *)

(* Transaction states *)
TxState == [id: Nat, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"},
            readSet: [key \in Keys(db) -> Nat],
            writeSet: [key \in Keys(db) -> Nat]]

(* Initialize the database and transaction manager *)
Init == /\ db = [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0]
        /\ txns = [ ]
        /\ nextTxId = 1

(* Begin a new transaction *)
BeginTx == 
  LET txId == nextTxId
  IN /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
     /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId] = [id |-> txId,
                                          status |-> "active",
                                          readSet |-> [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0],
                                          writeSet |-> [k \in Keys(db) |-> 0]]]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Read a key within a transaction *)
Read(k) == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].readSet[k] = db[k]]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Write a key within a transaction *)
Write(k, v) == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].writeSet[k] = v]
     /\ UNCHANGED db

(* Commit a transaction *)
Commit == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ \A k \in Keys(db) : txns[txId].readSet[k] = db[k]
     /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "committed"]
        /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![k] = txns[txId].writeSet[k]]
     /\ UNCHANGED nextTxId

(* Abort a transaction *)
Abort == 
  LET txId == CHOOSE t \in Keys(txns) : txns[t].status = "active"
  IN /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![txId].status = "aborted"]
     /\ UNCHANGED db /\ UNCHANGED nextTxId

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == BeginTx \/ Read(k) \/ Write(k, v) \/ Commit \/ Abort

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, txns, nextTxId>>

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Keys(db) -> Nat]
          /\ txns \in [Keys(txns) -> TxState]
          /\ nextTxId \in Nat

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + RandomDrift]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]   \* Drift bounded by epsilon

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ turn' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ flag \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ turn \in 1..2

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Updates
VARIABLES infected, known


vars == <<known, infected>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N: \E j \in 1..N: i # j
          /\ known' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN known[k] \cup known[j] ELSE known[k]]
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup infected[j] ELSE infected[k]]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: \E u \in Updates: u \notin infected[i]
          /\ known' = known
          /\ infected' = [k \in 1..N |-> IF k = i THEN infected[k] \cup {u} ELSE infected[k]]


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N: known[i] \subseteq 1..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: infected[i] \subseteq Updates

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == 
  /\ free = {1, 2, .., N}
  /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == 
  /\ \E c \in Client : \E p \in free :
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
       /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
       /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
       /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ free' = free
      /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ free \subseteq {1, 2, .., N}
  /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq {1, 2, .., N}
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(allocated[c])
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c])
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c] \cup {1, 2, .., N})
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c] \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N})
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c] \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N})
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c] \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N})
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c] \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N})
  /\ \A c \in Client: IsFiniteSet(free \cup allocated[c] \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N} \cup {1, 2, .., N})

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE  Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Messages, Subscribers, Topics

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

Init == /\ subscribers = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
        /\ messages = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]

Next == /\ \E t \in Topics : \E s \in Subscribers :
          /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {s}]
          /\ messages' = messages
        \/ \E t \in Topics : \E m \in Messages :
          /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], m)]
          /\ subscribers' = subscribers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

TypeOK == /\ subscribers \in [Topics -> SUBSET Subscribers]
          /\ messages \in [Topics -> Seq(Messages)]

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts


vars == <<counts>>

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E m \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = counts[n][m] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<counts>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]
          /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat

====
